sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_controlpower_t (personnelid, personname, sexes, cardnumber, workunit, workjob, mobile, addoperator, addtime, updateoperator, updatetime, memo) VALUES ($personnelid$, '$personname$', '$sexes$', '$cardnumber$', '$workunit$', '$workjob$', '$mobile$', '$addoperator$', '$addtime$', '$updateoperator$', '$updatetime$', '$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_controlpower_t SET workunit='$workunit$', workjob='$workjob$', mobile='$mobile$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$', updatetime='$updatetime$', memo='$memo$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_personnel_controlpower_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM p_personnel_controlpower_t WHERE id = $id$ and validflag = 1
SELECT * FROM p_personnel_controlpower_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$ and validflag = 1
SELECT * FROM p_personnel_controlpower_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$ and validflag = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p_personnel_controlpower_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$ and validflag = 1
